title: aristida utilis
intro: Aristida utilis, also known as Indian grass or Aristida, is a type of grass species native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Aristida utilis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing pain. Aristida utilis is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
